description_long: This object is a blocky, stylized handgun with a rectangular slide finished in a tan color and a contrasting black grip. The slide features simple geometric details, including raised sights with green highlights at the rear and a squared-off front sight. The grip is angular and appears to have a subtle texturing, with a slightly flared magazine base. The trigger guard is thick and robust, with a squared profile and a slight undercut for finger placement. The barrel is short and flush with the slide, lacking any visible threading or compensator. The overall design is minimalist, with no visible manufacturer markings or decorative engravings.
description: A stylized, blocky handgun with a tan slide, black grip, green-highlighted sights, and a squared trigger guard. The design is minimalist and geometric, with subtle grip texturing and a flared magazine base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the squared muzzle, green-highlighted front and rear sights, and the rectangular profile of the slide.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the tan slide, black grip, squared trigger guard, and the geometric details along the slide and grip.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the back of the slide, rear sight, and the blocky, symmetrical design of the handgun.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the slide, grip, and trigger guard, with visible geometric patterns and the flared magazine base.
attribute_grip_design: The grip is angular and blocky, finished in black with subtle geometric texturing that suggests a non-slip surface. It has a slightly flared base for improved retention and appears to be made of polymer. There are no visible logos, finger grooves, or embellishments, giving it a minimalist and utilitarian appearance.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is thick, squared, and robust, with a slight undercut at the rear for ergonomic finger placement. Its profile is angular, matching the overall geometric design, and it lacks any visible texturing or reinforcement beyond its solid construction.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is short and flush with the front of the slide, with a plain, unthreaded muzzle. It has a standard rectangular profile and no visible compensator, porting, or external markings. The finish matches the slide, maintaining a consistent appearance.
attribute_slide_markings: There are no visible markings, engravings, or inscriptions on the slide. The surface is plain and unadorned, with only geometric detailing and color variation for visual interest.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: The magazine base is slightly flared and rectangular, extending just beyond the grip. It is finished in black and appears flat with no finger rest, logos, or additional texturing, maintaining the minimalist aesthetic.
